purpose_context: Binding: ADR 0005 (one API; every client is a client; there are no proxies). If a client ever needs to DECIDE something about messaging, the API is missing a route. Priority is the MCP server, because it is the only one that lets an agent use the hub. Definition of done includes a paste-able onboarding prompt and a real agent connecting to the live homelab hub.
purpose_tldr: An MCP server, a CLI and a web console — all ordinary clients of the one API, none holding messaging semantics.
